text:
EXPLANATION: OpenCompass is a well-known real-world open-source evaluation platform for foundation models, and the provided URL points to its official, verified GitHub repository. The cited authors "OpenCompass Contributors" is a valid way to represent the project maintainers.
LINK: https://github.com/open-compass/opencompass
FOUND_TITLE: OpenCompass: A universal evaluation platform for foundation models
FOUND_AUTHORS: OpenCompass Contributors
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
